prompt: A powerful surreal yet realistic scene of a human figure standing under an invisible burden. On one side, the air is clean and light, almost invisible, with soft natural light. On the other side, thick dense black polluted air forms a heavy, tangible mass pressing down on the person's shoulders, bending them under its weight. The polluted air looks like a dark physical substance, suffocating and overwhelming. Minimal background, strong contrast, grounded realism, emotional, no text, no labels, no infographic, single frame.
insight: Air pollution acts as an invisible but crushing burden on human life
